name: Tips for Making the Perfect Buttermilk Biscui
recipeInstructions:
1. Replace your baking powder if it's more than four months old.
2. Sift the dry ingredients four times for a lighter, more tender biscuit.
3. Cut the dough into 1-inch pieces and turn them upside down on a baking sheet.
4. Mix 3/4 cup cold buttermilk and 1/4 teaspoon sugar (if using) in a bowl.
5. Gently handle the dough, dusting hands and dough with flour as needed to keep it manageable.
6. Place the biscuit pieces on a preheated oven set to 425°F (220°C).
7. Bake until golden brown, about 12-15 minutes.
